package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : 15 – 20 K per month Salary after 6 months Internship : CTC 45 – 65 K per month o Competitive packages o Hands-on training o Career growth opportunities

Round 3: Culture Fit (45 min) – Learning ability
Round 4: Executive Round (30 min) – Vision alignment
